text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Muy bien! You defeated the claw machine!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That was hella exciting! The moment when the
claw lifted the plushie, I swear my heart leapt into
my mouth!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It was close, but I was so relieved when you
managed it! Thank you!
